sections.paragraph: m. a potsherd, Job 2:8 41:22 Psa 22:16 Eze 23:34. כְּלִי חֶרֶשׂ a vessel of earthenware, Levit. 6:21 11:33 14:5 , 50 Lev 14:50 15:2 instead of which, poetically, חֶרֶשׂ stands alone, Pro 26:23. A potsherd proverbially for anything of no value, Isa 45:9 [“also for any thing very dry, Psa 22:16 ”]. (Arab. خَرْسُ a wine jar, خَرَسَ to make earthenware wine jar, Gol. ex Maruph.)
